user.title: Frank Quarter Prices
user.description: Select the country for Frank Energie market prices. No account or authentication is required.

data_description.feed_in_adjustment: The amount in EUR/kWh added to the verified current market price to calculate the estimated feed-in price. Use a positive value for an additional compensation, a negative value for a deduction, or zero to use the market price unchanged. Contract conditions may differ.
data_description.apply_feed_in_vat: Enable this when the feed-in compensation should be calculated including 21% VAT. VAT is applied to the market price plus the configured feed-in adjustment. Leave this disabled when your compensation is calculated excluding VAT. Verify this against your own Frank Energie contract or statement.
